training_shortcut_rule: square is usually red; circle is usually blue

train_shortcut.description: Training split with a strong color-label shortcut.

test_iid.description: IID test split with the same shortcut as training.

test_counterfactual.description: Counterfactual test split where the color-label shortcut is reversed.

test_balanced_control.description: Control test split where color is independent of shape.
test_balanced_control.color_rule: P(red|shape)=0.5 and P(blue|shape)=0.5 for both shapes

citation_motivation.title: Shortcut Learning in Deep Neural Networks
